name: Team Page
description: Team page with hero, team member grid, company values icon boxes, timeline of milestones, and hiring CTA.

fields.heading: Meet Our Team
fields.subheading: A diverse group of makers, thinkers, and problem-solvers united by a shared mission to build great products.

members.name: Alex Rivera
members.bio: 20 years in tech leadership. Previously VP Product at Stripe. Passionate about making complex tools feel simple.

members.name: Priya Sharma
members.bio: Distributed systems architect and former AWS principal engineer. Leads engineering, security, and infrastructure.

members.name: Marcus Chen
members.bio: Former McKinsey partner who scaled operations at two unicorn startups. Keeps the trains running on time.

members.name: Sofia Bergman
members.bio: Brand strategist who built HubSpot's content engine. Believes the best marketing is just being genuinely helpful.

members.name: Jordan Blake
members.bio: Full-stack polyglot who's shipped products at scale in Go, Rust, and TypeScript. Advocates for developer experience.

members.name: Emma Lindqvist
members.bio: Award-winning product designer from Stockholm. Former design lead at Spotify. Champions accessibility-first design.

members.name: Daniel Okafor
members.bio: 10 years shaping the Jira roadmap at Atlassian. Obsessed with understanding what users need before they know they need it.

members.name: Lina Rossi
members.bio: PhD in machine learning from MIT. Previously led the recommendations team at Netflix. Making automation feel magical.

items.title: Clarity Over Cleverness
items.description: We write clear code, give direct feedback, and build products that explain themselves. Simple beats smart.

items.title: Users Come First
items.description: Every decision starts with the question: how does this make our users' lives better? If it doesn't, we don't build it.

items.title: Iterate Relentlessly
items.description: We ship early, learn fast, and improve constantly. Version one is just the beginning of the conversation.

items.title: Take Care of Each Other
items.description: Great work comes from people who feel supported. We invest in growth, celebrate wins, and show up for each other.

items.title: Own the Outcome
items.description: We don't pass the buck. Every team member has the autonomy and accountability to drive results from start to finish.

items.title: Stay Curious
items.description: The best ideas come from unexpected places. We read widely, experiment often, and never assume we have all the answers.

items.title: 2 Founders
items.description: Alex and Priya start building in a Portland garage.

items.title: 45 People
items.description: Series A fuels rapid hiring across engineering and design.

items.title: 120 People
items.description: International expansion brings offices in London and Singapore.

items.title: 200+ People
items.description: A global, remote-first team across four continents.

fields.heading: Want to Join the Team?
fields.description: We're growing fast and always looking for talented people. Competitive pay, generous equity, and a culture that values your wellbeing.
